creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your UAE National Day outings:

🎆 Watch the fireworks:
Dec 1 at 8 PM: Bluewaters and The Beach
Dec 2 at 8 PM: Hatta 
Dec 2 at 9 PM: Dubai Festival City
Dec 3 at 9 PM: Al Seef

🏚️ Get in touch with the nation’s rich heritage at Al Shindagha Museum. There will be free outdoor cultural activities from Nov 28 to Dec 3. If you want to explore the museum exhibits, ticket is AED 50. 

🥗 Taste Emirati cuisine. Our fave local restaurants are:
Al Fanar in Al Seef (featured in this reel)
Arabian Tea House
Al Khayma Heritage Restaurant 

🇦🇪 Visit The Flag Garden in Umm Suqeim Beach. Free entry! 

Tag your family and friends! 
Happy 53rd UAE National Day!
